description: Create a fully constrained 2D profile of a belt path around two pulleys and extrude it to a 15mm depth. The left pulley has a radius of 50mm centered at the origin (0,0). The right pulley has a radius of 25mm with its center located 250mm from the origin on the X-axis (Y=0). Connect the pulleys with tangent lines to form a single closed loop before extruding. Save the resulting model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/belt_envelope.slvs.
